label: console
documentation: Provides methods for logging information, warnings, errors, and performance timing within the script environment.

label: log
documentation: Print out the values in the game console, separated by spaces.

label: warn
documentation: Print out the values in the game console (In WARNING level), separated by spaces.

label: error
documentation: Print out the values in the game console (In ERROR level), separated by spaces.

label: debug
documentation: Print out the values in debug mode (Only if JCM's Script Debug Mode is enabled), separated by spaces.

label: count
documentation: Increment 1 to a counter named as the label, as well as printing out the incremented counter value. Each label has a separate counter.

label: countReset
documentation: Set 0 to a counter named as the label, as well as printing out the counter value. Each label has a separate counter.

label: time
documentation: Start a timer named as the label. Each label has a separate timer.

label: timeLog
documentation: Print out how many millisecond has elapsed since the timer is first started. Each label has a separate timer.

label: timeEnd
documentation: Reset a timer named as the label, as well as printing out how many millisecond has elapsed since the timer is first started. Each label has a separate timer.
